speaker: speaker1
text: Hello , I scheduled an appointment with Dr . Smith , and I can ’ t make it on that day .

speaker: speaker2
text: What day was your appointment on ?

speaker: speaker2
text: I am looking at your appointment right now . What day would you prefer ?

speaker: speaker2
text: What time would be best for you ?

speaker: speaker1
text: I want to come in at 2

speaker: speaker2
text: I am writing you down for that time . We look forward to seeing you .
